sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22850" key="gri/pwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γρίπων</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">γρῖπος</etym>) <sense id="n22850.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fisherman</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γρίπωνος γριπεὺς . . ἔχωσε τάφον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.504.12</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Leon</placeName>). (Prob. a pr. n.)</sense> </entryFree>
